Aspect Description: DynamoDB table titanflow-repo-table billing mode is PAY_PER_REQUEST
Extra Description / Judgement Scale: aws dynamodb describe-table --table-name titanflow-repo-table ‚Üí BillingModeSummary.BillingMode = PAY_PER_REQUEST

Aspect Description: ECS task definition specifies exactly 256 CPU units and 512 MiB memory
Extra Description / Judgement Scale: aws ecs describe-task-definition ‚Üí cpu=256 memory=512

Aspect Description: API Gateway prod stage cache cluster size is 0.5 GB
Extra Description / Judgement Scale: aws apigateway get-stage --rest-api-id <id> --stage-name prod ‚Üí cacheClusterSize = 0.5

Aspect Description: S3 lifecycle rule on titanflow-<state>-logs transitions objects to STANDARD_IA at 30 days and expires at 90 days
Extra Description / Judgement Scale: aws s3api get-bucket-lifecycle-configuration ‚Üí rule with transition Days=30 StorageClass=STANDARD_IA and expiration Days=90

Aspect Description: AWS Backup plan rule retention is exactly 7 days
Extra Description / Judgement Scale: aws backup get-backup-plan ‚Üí rules[0].lifecycle.deleteAfterDays = 7

Aspect Description: No additional EC2 instances exist beyond the pre-provisioned engine instance
Extra Description / Judgement Scale: aws ec2 describe-instances ‚Üí runningCount = 1 (engine only; ECS Fargate tasks are not EC2 instances)

Aspect Description: Container Insights is enabled on ECS cluster titanflow-<state>-cluster
Extra Description / Judgement Scale: aws ecs describe-clusters --clusters titanflow-<state>-cluster ‚Üí settings[name=containerInsights].value = enabled

Aspect Description: ALB access logs are enabled and target S3 bucket titanflow-<state>-logs with prefix alb/
Extra Description / Judgement Scale: aws elbv2 describe-load-balancer-attributes ‚Üí access_logs.s3.enabled=true and access_logs.s3.bucket=titanflow-<state>-logs and access_logs.s3.prefix=alb

Aspect Description: VPC Flow Logs are enabled on the default VPC and deliver to CloudWatch Logs group titanflow-<state>-flowlogs
Extra Description / Judgement Scale: aws ec2 describe-flow-logs ‚Üí logDestinationType=cloud-watch-logs and logGroupName=titanflow-<state>-flowlogs

Aspect Description: CloudWatch Dashboard named titanflow-<state>-dashboard exists with at least 3 widgets covering ALB ECS DDB and SQS
Extra Description / Judgement Scale: aws cloudwatch get-dashboard ‚Üí dashboardBody widget count >= 3 and metrics span ALB ECS DDB SQS

Aspect Description: All 4 CloudWatch alarms (ELB 5xx ECS CPU DDB throttle ALB healthy host) exist with correct metric names and namespaces
Extra Description / Judgement Scale: aws cloudwatch describe-alarms ‚Üí 4 alarms with metricName/namespace matching specification

Aspect Description: All 4 CloudWatch alarms have at least one alarm action pointing to SNS topic titanflow-<state>-alerts
Extra Description / Judgement Scale: aws cloudwatch describe-alarms ‚Üí each alarm alarmActions contains arn:aws:sns:us-east-1:<account>:titanflow-<state>-alerts

Aspect Description: SNS topic titanflow-<state>-alerts has at least one confirmed subscription
Extra Description / Judgement Scale: aws sns list-subscriptions-by-topic ‚Üí at least 1 entry with SubscriptionStatus = SubscriptionConfirmed

Aspect Description: X-Ray active tracing is enabled on the API Gateway prod stage
Extra Description / Judgement Scale: aws apigateway get-stage --stage-name prod ‚Üí tracingEnabled = true

Aspect Description: X-Ray group named titanflow-slow exists with filter expression: responsetime > 1
Extra Description / Judgement Scale: aws xray get-groups ‚Üí group filterExpression = "responsetime > 1" and groupName = titanflow-slow

Aspect Description: CloudWatch Logs metric filter on /ecs/catalog-service produces metric RateLimitHits in namespace TitanFlow/RateLimit
Extra Description / Judgement Scale: aws logs describe-metric-filters --log-group-name /ecs/catalog-service ‚Üí filter with metricTransformations[0].metricName=RateLimitHits metricNamespace=TitanFlow/RateLimit

Aspect Description: CloudWatch Dashboard widget coverage and metric relevance
Extra Description / Judgement Scale: 0=dashboard absent or fewer than 3 widgets; 1=3+ widgets but missing one of ALB/ECS/DDB/SQS groups; 2=all 4 groups present with at least one metric each; 3=all 4 groups present with multiple metrics per group (p50+p99 for ALB; latency+counts for ECS; tasks+throttle for DDB; queue depth+DLQ depth for SQS)

Aspect Description: WAF WebACL named titanflow-<state>-waf exists with scope REGIONAL
Extra Description / Judgement Scale: aws wafv2 list-web-acls --scope REGIONAL ‚Üí Name=titanflow-<state>-waf present

Aspect Description: WAF WebACL contains a rate-based rule with limit 1000 requests per 5-minute window aggregated per IP
Extra Description / Judgement Scale: aws wafv2 get-web-acl ‚Üí rule with Statement.RateBasedStatement.Limit=1000 AggregateKeyType=IP

Aspect Description: WAF WebACL contains AWSManagedRulesCommonRuleSet as a managed rule group
Extra Description / Judgement Scale: aws wafv2 get-web-acl ‚Üí rule with Statement.ManagedRuleGroupStatement.Name=AWSManagedRulesCommonRuleSet

Aspect Description: WAF WebACL is associated with the API Gateway prod stage (not the ALB)
Extra Description / Judgement Scale: aws wafv2 list-resources-by-web-acl ‚Üí ResourceArn contains execute-api (API Gateway stage ARN)

Aspect Description: No plaintext database credentials in task definition environment variables or ECR image
Extra Description / Judgement Scale: Verify: task definition environment does not contain DB_PASSWORD or equivalent; reference to Secrets Manager secret snapshelf/rds/credentials only via secrets[] not environment[]

Aspect Description: Private ECR repository named catalog-service exists with image tagged catalog-service:1.0.0
Extra Description / Judgement Scale: aws ecr describe-repositories --repository-names catalog-service; aws ecr describe-images --repository-name catalog-service --image-ids imageTag=1.0.0

Aspect Description: WAF configuration correctness and association depth
Extra Description / Judgement Scale: 0=no WAF WebACL; 1=WebACL exists but not associated with API Gateway; 2=associated with rate-based rule only; 3=associated with both rate-based rule and AWSManagedRulesCommonRuleSet and correct scope REGIONAL

Aspect Description: ECS Application Auto Scaling scalable target has minCapacity=2 and maxCapacity=15
Extra Description / Judgement Scale: aws application-autoscaling describe-scalable-targets --service-namespace ecs ‚Üí MinCapacity=2 MaxCapacity=15

Aspect Description: Auto Scaling target tracking policy uses ALBRequestCountPerTarget metric with targetValue=200
Extra Description / Judgement Scale: aws application-autoscaling describe-scaling-policies ‚Üí predefinedMetricType=ALBRequestCountPerTarget targetValue=200.0

Aspect Description: Auto Scaling scale-out cooldown is 30 seconds and scale-in cooldown is 300 seconds
Extra Description / Judgement Scale: aws application-autoscaling describe-scaling-policies ‚Üí scaleOutCooldown=30 scaleInCooldown=300

Aspect Description: ALB target group titanflow-<state>-tg deregistration delay is exactly 30 seconds
Extra Description / Judgement Scale: aws elbv2 describe-target-group-attributes ‚Üí deregistration_delay.timeout_seconds = 30

Aspect Description: DynamoDB GSI CategoryIndex exists with PK=category (S) SK=product_id (S) and Projection=ALL
Extra Description / Judgement Scale: aws dynamodb describe-table ‚Üí GlobalSecondaryIndexes[name=CategoryIndex] KeySchema and Projection match specification

Aspect Description: DynamoDB GSI WarehouseIndex exists with PK=warehouse_zone (S) SK=last_updated (S) and Projection=ALL
Extra Description / Judgement Scale: aws dynamodb describe-table ‚Üí GlobalSecondaryIndexes[name=WarehouseIndex] KeySchema and Projection match specification

Aspect Description: DynamoDB Streams enabled on titanflow-repo-table with StreamViewType=NEW_AND_OLD_IMAGES
Extra Description / Judgement Scale: aws dynamodb describe-table ‚Üí StreamSpecification.StreamEnabled=true StreamViewType=NEW_AND_OLD_IMAGES

Aspect Description: EventBridge Pipe titanflow-<state>-pipe is RUNNING with DDB Stream source and INSERT-only filter
Extra Description / Judgement Scale: aws pipes describe-pipe ‚Üí currentState=RUNNING source ARN contains titanflow-repo-table sourceParameters.filterCriteria.filters contains pattern matching eventName=INSERT

Aspect Description: DynamoDB Point-in-Time Recovery enabled on titanflow-repo-table
Extra Description / Judgement Scale: aws dynamodb describe-continuous-backups --table-name titanflow-repo-table ‚Üí PointInTimeRecoveryDescription.PointInTimeRecoveryStatus = ENABLED

Aspect Description: API Gateway prod stage caching enabled with cluster size 0.5 GB and default TTL 180 seconds
Extra Description / Judgement Scale: aws apigateway get-stage --stage-name prod ‚Üí cacheClusterEnabled=true cacheClusterSize=0.5 methodSettings has *_/* with cacheTtlInSeconds=180

Aspect Description: Per-method cache override: GET /products/{id} cached and POST /products plus list-style query routes uncached
Extra Description / Judgement Scale: aws apigateway get-stage --stage-name prod ‚Üí methodSettings: GET /{proxy+}/cachingEnabled=true; POST /{proxy+}/cachingEnabled=false

Aspect Description: ALB target group health check uses path /health with healthy threshold 2 and 15 second interval
Extra Description / Judgement Scale: aws elbv2 describe-target-groups ‚Üí HealthCheckPath=/health HealthyThresholdCount=2 HealthCheckIntervalSeconds=15

Aspect Description: Container health check command validates the local /health endpoint via wget
Extra Description / Judgement Scale: aws ecs describe-task-definition ‚Üí containerDefinitions[0].healthCheck.command contains wget and /health

Aspect Description: ECS service tasks are running in at least 2 distinct Availability Zones at competition close
Extra Description / Judgement Scale: aws ecs list-tasks; aws ecs describe-tasks ‚Üí task availabilityZone values cover >= 2 AZs

Aspect Description: SQS queue titanflow-<state>-inventory-queue exists with VisibilityTimeout = 30
Extra Description / Judgement Scale: aws sqs get-queue-attributes --queue-url <url> ‚Üí Attributes.VisibilityTimeout = 30

Aspect Description: Live engine score at competition close
Extra Description / Judgement Scale:
Score is blank or engine never received traffic;
1=if position in leaderboard = 3
2=if position in leaderboard = 2
3=if position in leaderboard = 1

Aspect Description: CloudWatch log group /ecs/catalog-service has retention policy set to 30 days or fewer
Extra Description / Judgement Scale: aws logs describe-log-groups --log-group-name-prefix /ecs/catalog-service ‚Üí retentionInDays is set and <= 30

Aspect Description: CloudWatch log group titanflow-<state>-flowlogs has retention policy set to 30 days or fewer
Extra Description / Judgement Scale: aws logs describe-log-groups --log-group-name-prefix titanflow-<state>-flowlogs ‚Üí retentionInDays is set and <= 30

Aspect Description: SQS DLQ titanflow-<state>-inventory-dlq exists and is the redrive target so failed messages do not stay invisible in the main queue
Extra Description / Judgement Scale: aws sqs get-queue-attributes on inventory-queue ‚Üí Attributes.RedrivePolicy.deadLetterTargetArn ends with titanflow-<state>-inventory-dlq

Aspect Description: All competitor-created resources follow the naming convention titanflow-<state>-<suffix>
Extra Description / Judgement Scale: Spot-check each resource: cluster service alb tg apiGW waf inventory-queue inventory-dlq pipe vault plan logs alerts dashboard ‚Äî all names match titanflow-<state>-<suffix>

Aspect Description: CompetitorId=<state_code> tag is present on competitor-created resources
Extra Description / Judgement Scale: aws resourcegroupstaggingapi get-resources --tag-filters Key=CompetitorId Value=<state> ‚Üí at least 5 distinct resource types returned

Aspect Description: SSM parameter /titanflow/api_endpoint contains a valid HTTPS API Gateway invoke URL ending with /prod
Extra Description / Judgement Scale: aws ssm get-parameter --name /titanflow/api_endpoint ‚Üí Value matches https://<id>.execute-api.us-east-1.amazonaws.com/prod

Aspect Description: AWS Backup vault titanflow-<state>-vault and plan titanflow-<state>-backup both exist with titanflow-repo-table assigned as a protected resource
Extra Description / Judgement Scale: aws backup list-backup-vaults; aws backup list-backup-plans; aws backup list-backup-selections ‚Üí table ARN present in resource assignment
